title: Dreams
content:
They mock the present and they haunt the past,
    And in the future there is naught agleam
    With hope, the soul desires, that at last
    The heart pursuing does not find a dream.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Madison Julius Cawein, titled "Dreams", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
